guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 14. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_th: Point to the big TH and say: ththth. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_wh: Now point to the big WH and say: whwhwh.

parent_story: The white whale saw a thick net. The whale swam away with a big splash!
